title: Arlong’s Speed Takes Over
description: On pages 5–8, arlong’s speed takes over focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong unleashes his brutal speed and teeth-based attacks as Luffy refuses to back down.
scene: On pages 5–8, arlong’s speed takes over focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong unleashes his brutal speed and teeth-based attacks as Luffy refuses to back down.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hmph! You just got lucky that time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: As if I'll let you! GONU GONU...

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
